sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30999" key="ei)kosikaitetraplasi/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰκοσῐ-καιτετραπλᾰσίων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n30999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twenty-four times as great</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:3:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
